description: Configure the Bologna Pasubio simulation (/home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/run.sumocfg) to output Surrogate Safety Measures (SSM) for all vehicles. Save the modified configuration to /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/run_ssm.sumocfg with an SSM probability of 1.0, tracked measures set to 'TTC DRAC', and critical thresholds set to '5.0 3.0'. Run the simulation headlessly to generate /home/ga/SUMO_Output/ssm.xml. Count the total number of conflict elements in the resulting output and write only the integer count to /home/ga/SUMO_Output/conflict_count.txt.
